name: Seald
description: Seald — End-to-end encryption SDK for adding zero-knowledge encryption to applications without key management.

seo.title: Seald — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Seald: Seald — End-to-end encryption SDK for adding zero-knowledge encryption to applications without key management.

when_to_use: End-to-end encryption SDK for zero-knowledge app data
Adding E2E encryption without managing key infrastructure
Client-side encryption for healthcare and legal SaaS apps
GDPR-compliant user data encryption with delegated key access
Encrypted file sharing where even the server can't read data

pros: Zero-knowledge E2EE SDK, no key management code
cons: Smaller community than Virgil or Matrix
review.verdict: Quick path to end-to-end encryption without cryptography expertise, lock-in trade-off against rolling your own.
review.best_for: Product teams adding E2EE without hiring cryptographers, especially in healthcare or legal
review.not_for: Teams preferring open-source crypto stacks they can audit and self-host
